tags.description:patient_parking: Parking for patients of Dental School Clinic and University Health Service (UHS) Clinic only. Please take ticket to the clinic for validation. Payment by credit card only. Non-patient parkers will be charged a $30 fine plus the parking fee.
tags.description:permit_parking: U of M Blue parking permit required. Other valid permits: Gold. Enforcement hours: 6 AM-10 PM, Monday-Saturday; parking facilities are open to the public outside enforcement hours.

tags.description: Gothic revival house begun in 1848, and expanded through 1864. Reportedly the first house in Ann Arbor designed by an architect. Acquired by the local Baptist Guild in 1902, and the estate had other church buildings added.
tags.name: Silas Douglas House

tags.description: This roof area, supported by columns, covers the walkway to the South Entrance.
This roof area covers a basement exit door and part of the stairway leading up to ground level.
This roof covers the parking plaza for passengers to unload and unload. It also covers pedestrians walking from the elevators to the Dental School.

tags.description: The Rackham School grants graduate degrees to students in Colleges of the University. Important sites within this building are the Rackham Auditorium and the Rackham Lecture Hall.
